author: Marie-Laure Thuret
subject: v4.1.0-beta.4
body: # [4.1.0-beta.4](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.1.0-beta.3...v4.1.0-beta.4) (2017-08-03) ### Bug Fixes * **deps:** Update dependency lint-staged to version ^4.0.0 (algolia/react-instantsearch#201) ([d0343f8](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/d0343f8)) * **nextjs/ssr:** parse `params.asPath` (algolia/react-instantsearch#189) ([dd83a81](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/dd83a81)) * **PoweredBy:** add a label to the Algolia logo (algolia/react-instantsearch#216) ([efc7d6e](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/efc7d6e)) * **react:** remove typo around `"" 2` (algolia/react-instantsearch#220) ([c2146f2](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/c2146f2)) * **ScrollTo:** scroll to only if change triggered by the widget observed (algolia/react-instantsearch#202) ([ea4f36b](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/ea4f36b)) * **theme:** format the count of items appearing in a refinement (algolia/react-instantsearch#217) ([d0c75a5](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/d0c75a5))
